source: initial hand-crafted v0.1 snapshot for runtime prediction vertical slice

entries.name: SLURM slurmctld Log Adapter
entries.description: Ingests slurmctld logs and produces oda.job.v0.2.0 job tables suitable for runtime prediction benchmarks.

entries.name: Job Runtime Baseline (Deterministic)
entries.description: A fast, deterministic baseline for predicting job runtime using job metadata and scheduler-observable signals.

entries.name: Job Runtime XGBoost (Rolling)
entries.description: Alternate runtime prediction model using XGBoost regression with automatic categorical one-hot/SVD preprocessing and rolling evaluation.

entries.name: Job Runtime TF-IDF + kNN (Rolling)
entries.description: Runtime prediction model using TF-IDF text vectorization of job metadata with k-nearest-neighbor regression and rolling evaluation.

entries.name: Job Runtime Embedding + kNN (Rolling)
entries.description: Runtime prediction model using precomputed dense embeddings of job metadata with similarity-weighted k-nearest-neighbor regression and rolling evaluation.

entries.name: Job Runtime Random Forest (Rolling)
entries.description: Alternate runtime prediction model using Random Forest regression with automatic categorical one-hot/SVD preprocessing and rolling evaluation.

entries.name: Job Runtime Feed-Forward MLP (Rolling)
entries.description: Alternate runtime prediction model using a feed-forward neural network (sklearn MLPRegressor) with automatic categorical one-hot/SVD preprocessing and rolling evaluation.

entries.name: Job Power UoPC (User kNN, Fixed)
entries.description: User-based online power prediction using per-user kNN regression on label-encoded job features (UoPC-style).

entries.name: Baseline Tiny (Job Runtime Prediction)
entries.description: Tiny synthetic benchmark recipe for runtime prediction baseline; used for CI smoke and offline demo.

entries.name: XGBoost Rolling Recent (Job Runtime Prediction)
entries.description: Rolling benchmark recipe for the XGBoost alternate runtime model over the most recent windows.

entries.name: MLP Rolling (Job Runtime Prediction)
entries.description: Rolling benchmark recipe for the feed-forward MLP runtime model with automatic categorical preprocessing (OHE + SVD) and a daily preprocessing refresh. Expects ingested job data supplied by the user.

entries.name: UoPC Fugaku Max Power (Job Power Prediction)
entries.description: User-based kNN (UoPC) benchmark recipe for Fugaku maximum job power (maxpcon) prediction with a fixed train/test split. Expects raw Fugaku parquet supplied by the user.

entries.name: PM100 (Marconi100 Jobs)
entries.description: Per-job SLURM accounting + per-job power curated from the Marconi100 M100 ExaData job_table (231,238 jobs, May-Oct 2020). Runtime-prediction target = run_time; fetched from Zenodo and normalized to oda.job.v0.2.0.

entries.name: F-DATA (Fugaku Jobs, recent month)
entries.description: Fujitsu/Fugaku job records from F-DATA (RIKEN R-CCS / Univ. Bologna). Premium runtime slice = most recent monthly file (2024-04, 420,450 jobs); full set spans Mar 2021-Apr 2024 (~24M jobs). Runtime target = duration; normalized to oda.job.v0.2.0.

entries.name: Adastra MI250 Jobs (15 days)
entries.description: SLURM per-job records from Adastra (CINES, HPE Cray EX, AMD MI250), a 15-day 2024 window (15,285 jobs). Runtime target = run_time; normalized to oda.job.v0.2.0. Per-job power columns available for a later power phase.

entries.name: CC-IN2P3 2024 Workload (recent month)
entries.description: SLURM sacct per-job trace from CC-IN2P3 (CNRS, France). Premium runtime slice = December 2024 (~2.35M jobs); full year = ~44M jobs. Runtime target = elapsed, requested walltime = timelimit; normalized to oda.job.v0.2.0.

entries.name: NREL Eagle Jobs (OEDI 5860)
entries.description: Per-job SLURM accounting for NREL's Eagle supercomputer (OEDI submission 5860), ~11.03M jobs 2018-Feb 2023 in a single parquet. Runtime-prediction target = run_time; fetched from OEDI and normalized to oda.job.v0.2.0.

entries.name: PWA KIT-FH2 (ForHLR II)
entries.description: Standard Workload Format log for ForHLR II (KIT-FH2) from the Parallel Workloads Archive (114,355 jobs, 2016-2018). Runtime target = Run Time; requested walltime = Requested Time; decoded via the swf decoder and normalized to oda.job.v0.2.0.

entries.name: PWA CEA-Curie (cleaned)
entries.description: Standard Workload Format cleaned log for CEA Curie (TGCC/GENCI) from the Parallel Workloads Archive (312,826 jobs, 2011-2012). Runtime target = Run Time; requested walltime = Requested Time; decoded via the swf decoder and normalized to oda.job.v0.2.0.

entries.name: PWA MetaCentrum (2013-2015)
entries.description: Standard Workload Format log for the Czech MetaCentrum grid (CESNET) from the Parallel Workloads Archive (5,731,100 jobs, 2013-2015) - the largest premium PWA runtime log. Runtime target = Run Time; requested walltime = Requested Time; decoded via the swf decoder and normalized to oda.job.v0.2.0.

entries.name: Atlas Mustang (LANL)
entries.description: LANL Mustang SLURM trace from the Atlas repository (~2.1M jobs, 2011-2016). Runtime target derived as end_time - start_time; requested walltime = wallclock_limit; synthesized row-index job_id (no id column); normalized to oda.job.v0.2.0.

entries.name: Atlas OpenTrinity (LANL)
entries.description: LANL Trinity (OpenTrinity) SLURM trace from the Atlas repository, formatted release (~25k jobs, 2017). Runtime target derived as end_time - start_time; requested walltime = wallclock_limit; synthesized row-index job_id; normalized to oda.job.v0.2.0.

entries.name: MIT Supercloud Datacenter Challenge (scheduler)
entries.description: Raw slurmdbd scheduler log from the MIT Supercloud Datacenter Challenge (202201), ~396k modern SLURM+GPU jobs; only the ~103 MB scheduler CSV is used (2 TB node telemetry excluded). Runtime derived as time_end - time_start; requested walltime = timelimit; normalized to oda.job.v0.2.0.

entries.name: NLR Kestrel Jobs (anonymized)
entries.description: Anonymized SLURM job records from the NLR Kestrel HPC system (H100 GPUs), Aug 2023 - Dec 2025, ~11M jobs, as a zipped Hive-partitioned Parquet dataset. Runtime derived as end_time - start_time; requested walltime = wallclock_req; user/account pre-hashed; normalized to oda.job.v0.2.0. Home-lab, freshest corpus.

entries.name: NLR Eagle Jobs (anonymized)
entries.description: Anonymized SLURM job records from the NLR Eagle HPC system, 2019-2024 full lifetime, ~13.8M jobs, as a zipped Hive-partitioned Parquet dataset (job records only; energy variant excluded). Runtime derived as end_time - start_time from the DST-correct tz columns; requested walltime = wallclock_req; user/account pre-hashed; normalized to oda.job.v0.2.0. Home-lab, definitive modern Eagle corpus.

entries.name: IC2 Integrated Cloud + HPC Jobs
entries.description: Purpose-built runtime + resource-utilization dataset spanning integrated cloud and HPC platforms (IC2, ALCF Polaris, AWS), 3,599 tasks. Per-task records flattened from nested workload JSON (per-node telemetry dropped); runtime derived as finish_time - start_time; no requested walltime. Normalized to oda.job.v0.2.0.

entries.name: PWA RICC (RIKEN Integrated Cluster)
entries.description: Standard Workload Format log for the RIKEN Integrated Cluster of Clusters (RICC) from the Parallel Workloads Archive (447,794 jobs, 2010). Runtime target = Run Time; requested walltime = Requested Time; decoded via the swf decoder and normalized to oda.job.v0.2.0.

entries.name: PWA HPC2N (Seth cluster)
entries.description: Standard Workload Format log for the HPC2N Seth cluster (Sweden) from the Parallel Workloads Archive (527,371 jobs, 2002-2006). Runtime target = Run Time; requested walltime = Requested Time; decoded via the swf decoder and normalized to oda.job.v0.2.0.

entries.name: PWA SDSC Blue Horizon
entries.description: Standard Workload Format log for the SDSC Blue Horizon (IBM SP) from the Parallel Workloads Archive (250,440 jobs, 2000-2002). Runtime target = Run Time; requested walltime = Requested Time; decoded via the swf decoder and normalized to oda.job.v0.2.0.

entries.name: Lassen LAST (LLNL)
entries.description: Per-job allocation history from LLNL's Lassen supercomputer (IBM CSM/LSF), 1,467,747 jobs, from the Livermore Archive for System Telemetry (LAST). Runtime derived as end_time - begin_time; requested walltime = time_limit; git-LFS file fetched over plain HTTPS via the LFS media URL (no git-lfs tool). Normalized to oda.job.v0.2.0.

entries.name: FRESCO Anvil Job Accounting
entries.description: Anonymized SLURM job accounting from Purdue's Anvil supercomputer (A100), FRESCO repository, 11 monthly CSVs (July 2022 - May 2023), 1,475,155 jobs. Runtime = Wall Time; requested walltime = Requested Wall Time; cores/gpus/nodes/queue/exit features. Fetched from the datadepot over direct HTTPS (no Globus). Normalized to oda.job.v0.2.0.

entries.name: FRESCO Conte Job Accounting
entries.description: Torque/PBS job accounting from Purdue's Conte cluster (FRESCO repository), 12 months 2015-03 to 2016-02, ~1.04M completed jobs. Runtime = resources_used.walltime; requested = Resource_List.walltime; MM/DD/YYYY timestamps; the require_nonnull filter keeps only completed (E) events. Fetched from the datadepot over direct HTTPS; normalized to oda.job.v0.2.0.

entries.name: FRESCO Stampede1 Job Accounting
entries.description: Slurm job accounting from TACC's Stampede1 (FRESCO repository), a single ~1.13 GB CSV of ~8.7M jobs (2013-2018). Runtime derived as end_time - start_time; requested walltime = the walltime column (minutes; UNLIMITED sentinels normalized to null); MM/DD/YYYY timestamps; user/account/jobID anonymized at source. 8,710,048 rows after dropping inverted-timestamp and non-positive-cpu rows. Fetched from the datadepot over direct HTTPS (no Globus); normalized to oda.job.v0.2.0.

entries.name: ALCF DJC — Polaris (2022–2026)
entries.description: DIM_JOB_COMPOSITE job accounting from Argonne's Polaris, all published years (2022-08 to 2026-06, 5 files), ALCF public DATA CATALOG. Cobalt/PBS with real requested walltime + elapsed runtime, cores/nodes used+requested, queue, exit status, machine, science field; user/project pre-anonymized. 957,606 jobs. Primary-quality. Manual-kind: ALCF gates downloads behind a one-time name/email form, so fetch the files yourself and `datasets prepare --from <dir>` checksum-verifies + normalizes them. See docs/datasets/alcf-djc-ingest.md.

entries.name: ALCF DJC — Aurora (2025–2026)
entries.description: DIM_JOB_COMPOSITE job accounting from Argonne's Aurora, all published years (2025-01 to 2026-06, 2 files), ALCF public DATA CATALOG. Same schema as the Polaris DJC dataset: PBS with real requested walltime + elapsed runtime, cores/nodes used+requested, queue, exit status, machine, science field; user/project pre-anonymized. 891,952 jobs. Primary-quality. Manual-kind: ALCF gates downloads behind a one-time name/email form, so fetch the files yourself and `datasets prepare --from <dir>` checksum-verifies + normalizes them. See docs/datasets/alcf-djc-ingest.md.
